sentence: 这座城市拥有多个世界级的博物馆。
pinyin: Zhè zuò chéngshì yōngyǒu duō gè shì jiè jí de bówùguǎn.
english: This city has several world-class museums.

sentence: 他负责婚礼现场的摄像。
pinyin: Tā fùzé hūnlǐ xiànchǎng de shèxiàng.
english: He is responsible for videotaping the wedding ceremony.

meaning: 1. to convert into; 2. to amount to; 3. to be equivalent to
sentence: 这一百美元折合人民币大约七百多块。
pinyin: Zhè yībǎi měiyuán zhéhé rénmínbì dàyuē qībǎi duō kuài.
english: One hundred US dollars converts to roughly over seven hundred yuan.

sentence: 爸爸用锤子把钉子敲进了墙里。
pinyin: Bàba yòng chuízi bǎ dīngzi qiāo jìn le qiáng lǐ.
english: Dad hammered the nail into the wall with a hammer.

sentence: 他决定留在农村扎根，帮助当地发展。
pinyin: Tā juédìng liú zài nóngcūn zhā gēn, bāngzhù dāngdì fāzhǎn.
english: He decided to put down roots in the countryside and help the local community develop.

meaning: 1. in a row; 2. in succession; 3. running
sentence: 她一连工作了三个小时都没休息。
pinyin: Tā yī lián gōngzuò le sān gè xiǎoshí dōu méi xiūxi.
english: She worked for three hours in a row without taking a break.

meaning: 1. to take over (from those working the previous shift); 2. to take ov
sentence: 儿子接班管理家族企业。
pinyin: Érzi jiēbān guǎnlǐ jiāzú qǐyè.
english: The son took over managing the family business.

sentence: 每月按时还款对信用很重要。
pinyin: Měi yuè ànshí huánkuǎn duì xìnyòng hěn zhòngyào.
english: Making loan repayments on time each month is important for your credit.

sentence: 看得出他今天心情不太好。
pinyin: Kàn de chū tā jīntiān xīnqíng bù tài hǎo.
english: You can tell that he is not in a great mood today.

sentence: 我牙痛了好几天，今天终于去看牙医了。
pinyin: Wǒ yátòng le hǎo jǐ tiān, jīntiān zhōngyú qù kàn yáyī le.
english: My tooth has been hurting for several days; I finally went to see the dentist today.

sentence: 奶奶每天早上吃几个核桃，说对大脑好。
pinyin: Nǎinai měitiān zǎoshang chī jǐ gè hétao, shuō duì dànǎo hǎo.
english: Grandma eats a few walnuts every morning, saying it's good for the brain.

meaning: 1. to read aloud with expression; 2. to recite; 3. to declaim
sentence: 她在晚会上朗诵了一首诗。
pinyin: Tā zài wǎnhuì shàng lǎngsòng le yī shǒu shī.
english: She recited a poem at the evening party.

sentence: 小女孩打扮成仙子去参加派对。
pinyin: Xiǎo nǚhái dǎban chéng xiānzǐ qù cānjiā pàiduì.
english: The little girl dressed up as a fairy to go to the party.

sentence: 我们去参观了鲁迅的故居。
pinyin: Wǒmen qù cānguān le Lǔ Xùn de gùjū.
english: We went to visit Lu Xun's former residence.

sentence: 这个城市有来自不同族裔的居民。
pinyin: Zhège chéngshì yǒu láizì bùtóng zúyì de jūmín.
english: This city has residents from different ethnic groups.

sentence: 她出版第一本书后就进入了文坛。
pinyin: Tā chūbǎn dì yī běn shū hòu jiù jìnrù le wéntán.
english: She entered literary circles after publishing her first book.

sentence: 公司给他一笔买断费用让他提前退休。
pinyin: Gōngsī gěi tā yī bǐ mǎiduàn fèiyòng ràng tā tíqián tuìxiū.
english: The company gave him a buyout package to let him retire early.

sentence: 实验室用培养基来培育细菌。
pinyin: Shíyànshì yòng péiyǎngjī lái péiyù xìjūn.
english: The lab uses culture medium to grow bacteria.

meaning: 1. first draft; 2. to draw up (a first version)
sentence: 他花了一个下午草拟合同草案。
pinyin: Tā huā le yī gè xiàwǔ cǎonǐ hétong cǎo'àn.
english: He spent an afternoon drafting the contract.

sentence: 狮子属于猫科下的豹亚科。
pinyin: Shīzi shǔyú māo kē xià de bào yàkē.
english: Lions belong to the subfamily Pantherinae under the family Felidae.

sentence: 我每个月的工资要扣除所得税。
pinyin: Wǒ měi gè yuè de gōngzī yào kòuchú suǒdéshuì.
english: Income tax is deducted from my monthly salary.

sentence: 这场暴雨具有明显的区域性特点。
pinyin: Zhè chǎng bàoyǔ jùyǒu míngxiǎn de qūyùxìng tèdiǎn.
english: This rainstorm has obvious regional characteristics.

sentence: 他收到了法院发来的传票。
pinyin: Tā shōudào le fǎyuàn fā lái de chuánpiào.
english: He received a summons from the court.

meaning: 1. to annotate; 2. annotation; 3. comment; 4. interpretation; 5. to ex
sentence: 这本古文书附有详细的注解。
pinyin: Zhè běn gǔwénshū fùyǒu xiángxì de zhùjiě.
english: This classical text comes with detailed annotations.

meaning: 1. machine room; 2. engine room; 3. computer room
sentence: 服务器都放在地下室的机房里。
pinyin: Fúwùqì dōu fàng zài dìxiàshì de jīfáng lǐ.
english: The servers are all kept in the machine room in the basement.

meaning: 1. internal affairs; 2. domestic affairs; 3. family affairs; 4. (trad.
sentence: 新兵每天早上都要整理内务。
pinyin: Xīnbīng měitiān zǎoshang dōu yào zhěnglǐ nèiwù.
english: New recruits have to tidy up their quarters every morning.

sentence: 市场里的商户都要按时缴纳摊位费。
pinyin: Shìchǎng lǐ de shānghù dōu yào ànshí jiǎonà tānwèifèi.
english: All merchants in the market must pay their stall fees on time.

sentence: 院子周围装了一圈木围栏。
pinyin: Yuànzi zhōuwéi zhuāng le yī quān mù wéilán.
english: A wooden fence was installed around the yard.

sentence: 台风来了，学校宣布明天停课。
pinyin: Táifēng lái le, xuéxiào xuānbù míngtiān tíngkè.
english: A typhoon is coming, so the school announced classes will be cancelled tomorrow.

sentence: 他换了一块新主板，电脑速度快多了。
pinyin: Tā huàn le yī kuài xīn zhǔbǎn, diànnǎo sùdù kuài duō le.
english: He replaced the motherboard and the computer runs much faster now.

sentence: 他每周日早上都去教堂参加弥撒。
pinyin: Tā měi zhōurì zǎoshang dōu qù jiàotáng cānjiā mísā.
english: He goes to church for Mass every Sunday morning.

sentence: 照片的远景是连绵的山脉。
pinyin: Zhàopiàn de yuǎnjǐng shì liánmián de shānmài.
english: The background of the photo shows rolling mountain ranges.

sentence: 搬家时需要几个人抬那根粗大的木梁。
pinyin: Bānjiā shí xūyào jǐ gè rén tái nà gēn cūdà de mùliáng.
english: Moving that thick wooden beam required several people to carry it.

meaning: 1. quotation (from a book or existing source)
sentence: 她在日记本里抄了很多名人语录。
pinyin: Tā zài rìjìběn lǐ chāo le hěn duō míngrén yǔlù.
english: She copied many famous quotations into her diary.

sentence: 科学家曾认为光通过以太传播。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiā céng rènwéi guāng tōngguò yǐtài chuánbō.
english: Scientists once believed light traveled through ether.

sentence: 山里的天气变化险恶，要做好准备。
pinyin: Shān lǐ de tiānqì biànhuà xiǎn'è, yào zuòhǎo zhǔnbèi.
english: The weather in the mountains can turn dangerously bad, so be prepared.

sentence: 请在座的各位保持安静。
pinyin: Qǐng zàizuò de gèwèi bǎochí ānjìng.
english: Please, everyone present keep quiet.

meaning: 1. to overlook; 2. to look down from a height
sentence: 站在山顶可以俯瞰整座城市。
pinyin: Zhàn zài shāndǐng kěyǐ fǔkàn zhěng zuò chéngshì.
english: Standing at the mountaintop, you can look down at the entire city.

meaning: 1. to develop simultaneously; 2. to undertake concurrently
sentence: 公司决定线上线下销售并举。
pinyin: Gōngsī juédìng xiànshàng xiànxià xiāoshòu bìngjǔ.
english: The company decided to develop online and offline sales simultaneously.

meaning: 1. to associate with; 2. to keep company with
sentence: 他不愿与那些不诚实的人为伍。
pinyin: Tā bù yuàn yǔ nàxiē bù chéngshí de rén wéiwǔ.
english: He is unwilling to associate with dishonest people.

sentence: 她在集市上买了几件手工饰品。
pinyin: Tā zài jíshì shàng mǎi le jǐ jiàn shǒugōng shìpǐn.
english: She bought a few handmade accessories at the market.

sentence: 这枚戒指上镶嵌着一颗红宝石。
pinyin: Zhè méi jièzhi shàng xiāngqiàn zhe yī kē hóngbǎoshí.
english: This ring is set with a ruby.

sentence: 周末我们去郊外的农庄采摘草莓。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù jiāowài de nóngzhuāng cǎizhāi cǎoméi.
english: On the weekend we went to a farm in the outskirts to pick strawberries.

sentence: 客服系统有一个常见问题知识库。
pinyin: Kèfú xìtǒng yǒu yī gè chángjiàn wèntí zhīshikù.
english: The customer service system has a knowledge base of frequently asked questions.

meaning: 1. premeditated; 2. to plan sth in advance (esp. a crime)
sentence: 警方认为这起案件是经过预谋的。
pinyin: Jǐngfāng rènwéi zhè qǐ ànjiàn shì jīngguò yùmóu de.
english: The police believe this case was premeditated.

sentence: 他们努力肃清组织内部的腐败行为。
pinyin: Tāmen nǔlì sùqīng zǔzhī nèibù de fǔbài xíngwéi.
english: They worked hard to purge corruption from within the organization.

meaning: 1. to presuppose; 2. to predispose; 3. to preset; 4. presupposition; 5
sentence: 软件的预设语言是英文，可以改成中文。
pinyin: Ruǎnjiàn de yùshè yǔyán shì Yīngwén, kěyǐ gǎi chéng Zhōngwén.
english: The software's default language is English, but it can be changed to Chinese.

sentence: 我在山里见到了一只漂亮的山鸡。
pinyin: Wǒ zài shān lǐ jiàndào le yī zhī piàoliang de shānjī.
english: I spotted a beautiful pheasant in the mountains.

sentence: 这部小说描写了当时社会的淫乱风气。
pinyin: Zhè bù xiǎoshuō miáoxiě le dāngshí shèhuì de yínluàn fēngqì.
english: This novel depicts the promiscuous social climate of that era.

sentence: 老师在黑板上写下了一道方程式。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài hēibǎn shàng xiě xià le yī dào fāngchéngshì.
english: The teacher wrote an equation on the blackboard.
